falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: Disprove that the partial P1 run contains genuine score-generation target failures rather than only reporting noise.
falsificationQueries: Check whether missing score units have exhausted `score_gen` targets.
Check whether artifacts and summaries still show full score completion.
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Missing units do have exhausted score-generation targets and no downstream score-critic targets. Diagnostics clearly overcount failures relative to terminal targets, but the raw unit tables still show 300 genuine missing score rows.
